title: MagickCore
body:
## MagickCore
        The MagicCore is a spell-programming magick mod that allows for free combination of spell functions and forms. Part of the conceptual setting is derived from Destiny 2, and the design inspiration comes from Psi.

        Emphasis is placed on the form of spells, and the execution method involves the continuous triggering of different forms. The form of a spell is essentially a selector, but it appears in the world as a gorgeous entity, which is more beautiful and easier to use. Players can choose different forms according to their needs, and then use the form to achieve their desired function.

## Getting Started
        To use the guide, one must install the Patchouli. Players must continuously make progress according to the guidebook and unlock new knowledge. Afterward, players will need to constantly explore and obtain the materials needed to make tools. When players first enter the world, they will be equipped with a guidebook and a randomly generated staff with a unique attribute. In dungeon chests, some of the mod's potions and randomly generated staffs will be generated for players to use.

## Notice
The spell forms themselves use special shaders to render the forms and colorful light sources, and compatibility with other rendering mods is not guaranteed. If compatibility issues are discovered, please provide feedback through GitHub. 

The mod is primarily updated for version 1.18.2 of Forge. If no major bugs are found, it will not be updated for version 1.16.5.

The mod is Oculus compatible and please do not report issues with Optifine.
